summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Correction Requests feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly. Employee can view 'My Corrections' button, view correction history modal, submit correction requests with new times and reason. Admin can see pending corrections on Dashboard with full details (requested times, reason) and can Approve or Reject requests.
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeTimesheet.jsx: Well-implemented correction request flow with proper modal handling and form validation
AdminDashboard.jsx: Clean display of pending corrections with requested changes, reason, and approve/reject buttons
Backend server.py: Proper validation of timesheet ownership before allowing correction requests
Backend properly applies approved corrections to timesheets and creates audit logs
seed_data_creation: Created test correction requests during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Correction Requests feature fully tested and working. Key test points verified: 1) 'My Corrections' button visible on Timesheet page with badge showing pending count, 2) Clicking opens correction history modal showing all requests with status (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED), 3) 'Request Correction' button appears on completed timesheet entries, 4) Correction form allows setting new clock in/out times and requires reason (min 10 chars), 5) Admin Dashboard shows 'Pending Corrections' section with employee name, requested changes, reason, and Approve/Reject buttons, 6) Admin can approve/reject and see success message, 7) Approved corrections update the timesheet times.

employee_my_corrections_button.details: 'My Corrections' button visible on Timesheet page with History icon and pending count badge

employee_correction_history_modal.details: Modal shows all correction requests with status (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED), requested changes, reason, and admin response

employee_request_correction_button.details: 'Request Correction' link appears in Actions column for completed timesheet entries

employee_correction_form.details: Form allows setting new clock in/out times via datetime-local inputs and requires reason (min 10 chars)

employee_submit_correction.details: Submit button sends request to API, shows success message, and refreshes correction history

admin_pending_corrections_display.details: Admin Dashboard shows 'Pending Corrections' section with employee name, submission date, requested changes (new clock in/out times), and reason

admin_approve_correction.details: Approve button works, shows success message 'Correction request approved', updates pending count to 0

admin_reject_correction.details: Reject button available and functional (tested via API)

admin_pending_requests_stat.details: Dashboard stat card shows 'Pending Requests' count combining corrections and leave requests

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/employee/correction-request: PASS - Creates correction request with timesheet_id, requested_change, reason
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/employee/correction-requests: PASS - Returns list of employee's correction requests
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/correction-requests: PASS - Returns all correction requests (filterable by status)
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/admin/correction-requests/{id}: PASS - Updates status to APPROVED/REJECTED with admin_notes
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/dashboard-stats: PASS - Returns pending_corrections and total_pending_requests counts
